endpoints.name: Gets availability of featured feed content for the apps by wiki domain.
endpoints.description:
Gets availability of featured feed content for the apps by wiki domain.

Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Check and normalize a TeX formula.
endpoints.description:
Checks the supplied TeX formula for correctness and returns the
normalised formula representation as well as information about
identifiers. Available types are tex and inline-tex. The response
contains the `x-resource-location` header which can be used to retrieve
the render of the checked formula in one of the supported rendering
formats. Just append the value of the header to `/media/math/{format}/`
and perform a GET request against that URL.

Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.

endpoints.name: Get a previously-stored formula
endpoints.description:
Returns the previously-stored formula via `/media/math/check/{type}` for
the given hash.

Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{HASH}} with a real hash.

endpoints.name: Get rendered formula in the given format.
endpoints.description:
Given a request hash, renders a TeX formula into its mathematic
representation in the given format. When a request is issued to the
`/media/math/check/{format}` POST endpoint, the response contains the
`x-resource-location` header denoting the hash ID of the POST data. Once
obtained, this endpoint has to be used to obtain the actual render.

Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{HASH}} with a real hash.

endpoints.name:
Get the sum of absolute value of text bytes difference between current edit and
previous one.
endpoints.description:
Given a Mediawiki project and a date range, returns a timeseries of absolute bytes
difference sums. You can filter by editors-type (all-editor-types, anonymous, group-bot,
name-bot, user) and page-type (all-page-types, content, non-content). You can choose
between daily and monthly granularity as well.

- Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
- Rate limit: 25 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{EDITOR-TYPE}} with a real editor-type. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PAGE-TYPE}} with a real page-type. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

endpoints.name: Get the sum of absolute text bytes difference per page.
endpoints.description:
Given a Mediawiki project, a page-title prefixed with canonical namespace (for
instance 'User:Jimbo_Wales') and a date range, returns a timeseries of bytes
difference absolute sums. You can filter by editors-type (all-editor-types, anonymous,
group-bot, name-bot, user). You can choose between daily and monthly granularity as well.

- Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
- Rate limit: 25 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{EDITOR-TYPE}} with a real editor-type. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{PAGE-TITLE}} with a real page-title. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PAGE-TYPE}} with a real page-type. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

endpoints.name: Get edited-pages counts for a project.
endpoints.description:
Given a Mediawiki project and a date range, returns a timeseries of its edited-pages counts.
You can filter by editor-type (all-editor-types, anonymous, group-bot, name-bot, user),
page-type (all-page-types, content or non-content) or activity-level (1..4-edits,
5..24-edits, 25..99-edits, 100..-edits). You can choose between daily and monthly
granularity as well.

- Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
- Rate limit: 25 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).

Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PAGE-TYPE}} with a real page-type. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{ACTIVITY-LEVEL}} with a real activity-level.

endpoints.description:
Given a Mediawiki project and a date (day or month), returns a timeseries of the top 100

The user_text returned is either the mediawiki user_text if the user is registered, or
null if user is anonymous.

- Rate limit: 25 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).

You can filter by editors-type (all-editor-types, anonymous, group-bot, name-bot, user).
You can choose between daily and monthly granularity as well.

- Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)

endpoints.name: GET /metrics/legacy/pagecounts/aggregate/{project}/{access-site}/{granularity}/{start}/{end}
endpoints.description:
Given a project and a date range, returns a timeseries of pagecounts.
You can filter by access site (mobile or desktop) and you can choose between monthly,
daily and hourly granularity as well.

- Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
- Rate limit: 100 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{ACCESS-SITE}} with a real access-site. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

endpoints.name: Get pageview counts for a project.
endpoints.description:
Given a date range, returns a timeseries of pageview counts. You can filter by project,
access method and/or agent type. You can choose between daily and hourly granularity
as well.

- Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable)
- Rate limit: 100 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{ACCESS}} with a real access. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{AGENT}} with a real agent. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

endpoints.name: Get pageview counts for a page.
endpoints.description:
Given a Mediawiki article and a date range, returns a daily timeseries of its pageview
counts. You can also filter by access method and/or agent type.

- Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable)
- Rate limit: 100 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{ARTICLE}} with a real article. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{ACCESS}} with a real access. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{AGENT}} with a real agent. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

endpoints.name: Get pageviews by country and access method.
endpoints.description:
Lists the pageviews to this project, split by country of origin for a given month.
Because of privacy reasons, pageviews are given in a bucketed format, and countries
with less than 100 views do not get reported.
Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
- Rate limit: 100 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{MONTH}} with a real month. Replace {{ACCESS}} with a real access. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: Get the most viewed articles for a project.
endpoints.description:
Lists the 1000 most viewed articles for a given project and timespan (month or day).
You can filter by access method.

- Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable)
- Rate limit: 100 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{ACCESS}} with a real access. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year. Replace {{DAY}} with a real day. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{MONTH}} with a real month.

endpoints.name: Get newly registered users counts for a project.
endpoints.description:
Given a Mediawiki project and a date range, returns a timeseries of its newly registered
users counts. You can choose between daily and monthly granularity. The newly registered
users value is computed with self-created users only, not auto-login created ones.

- Stability: [experimental](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Experimental)
- Rate limit: 25 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{END}} with a real end. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity.

endpoints.name: Get unique devices count per project
endpoints.description:
Given a project and a date range, returns a timeseries of unique devices counts.
You need to specify a project, and can filter by accessed site (mobile or desktop).
You can choose between daily and hourly granularity as well.

- Stability: [stable](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/API_versioning#Stable)
- Rate limit: 100 req/s
- License: Data accessible via this endpoint is available under the
  [CC0 1.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{ACCESS-SITE}} with a real access-site. Replace {{START}} with a real start. Replace {{GRANULARITY}} with a real granularity. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{END}} with a real end.

endpoints.name: Machine-translate content
endpoints.description:
Fetches the machine translation for the posted content from the source
to the destination language.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{WIKIMEDIA_API_KEY}} with your WIKIMEDIA API KEY. Replace {{FROM_LANG}} with a real from_lang. Replace {{TO_LANG}} with a real to_lang.

Fetches the dictionary meaning of a word from a language and displays
